title: Niche playbook: trust-signals
description: The niche's curated trust badge / certification / affiliation library. Each entry has match-keywords that Stage 4 fuzzy-matches against research.certifications to populate per-client badges. The library ships with the niche playbook and is FROZEN during client runs (Stage 4 reads but never modifies).

trustStripCount.description: How many badges render in the niche template's primary trust signal surface. Typical ranges: 3-5 for editorial, 4-6 for trades / home-services, 6+ for B2B. The actual surface name varies per niche (strip, floating pill, inline list, etc.).

placements.description: Components where the trust badges render. Niche playbook lists 3-5 placements typically.

badges.description: Curated badge library for this niche. Each badge has match keywords for fuzzy lookup against research data. Badge image files live alongside this schema at templates/{slug}/niche-playbook/trust-badges/{id}.{ext}.

id.description: Stable identifier. Matches the badge image filename stem.

matchKeywords.description: Substrings the asset-scraper fuzzy-matches against research data to detect whether a client qualifies for this badge. Case-insensitive.

filename.description: Badge image filename inside niche-playbook/trust-badges/. SVG preferred, then PNG.

issuer.description: Organisation that issues this certification / affiliation. Used in the badge's title attribute for accessibility.

issuerUrl.description: Where the client can verify or apply for this certification.

validationRegex.description: Optional regex to confirm a client's certification number matches the format the issuer uses. Stops fabricated numbers passing QA.

tier.description: Optional tier tag so the trust signal surface can prefer higher-tier badges when more than `trustStripCount` qualify.

isMultiColor.description: If true, the badge keeps its official multi-colour palette. If false, the build agent applies monochrome (single accent or pure white). Default false.
